stars.BH: Black hole remnant with extreme gravity and near-zero emitted light. Dangerous navigation anchor and a signature high-risk anomaly site.
stars.NS: Neutron star remnant: ultra-dense collapsed core with intense radiation and compact size.
stars.MG: Magnetar-like remnant with exceptionally strong magnetic fields and volatile energetic behavior.
stars.QS: Quark-star-inspired compact remnant potentially denser than standard neutron stars, with minimal visible output.
stars.BS: Boson-star-inspired compact exotic object represented as a dim, highly compact gravitating source.
stars.O: Very hot, massive blue star with high luminosity and short lifespan.
stars.B: Hot blue-white massive star, luminous and comparatively uncommon.
stars.A: White main-sequence star, bright and moderately massive.
stars.F: Yellow-white star, transitional between hot A stars and solar-like G stars.
stars.G: Solar-like yellow star with balanced luminosity and long-term stability.
stars.K: Orange cooler star, common and generally long-lived.
stars.M: Red dwarf class, very common, cool, and long-lived.
stars.W: Wolf-Rayet class with powerful stellar winds and extreme luminosity.
stars.WN: Wolf-Rayet nitrogen sequence star with stripped outer layers and intense outflows.
stars.WC: Wolf-Rayet carbon sequence star enriched in heavier fusion products.
stars.WO: Rare oxygen-sequence Wolf-Rayet star at a highly evolved massive-star stage.
stars.L: Warm brown-dwarf class with low mass and faint infrared output.
stars.T: Cool methane-rich brown-dwarf class with very low luminosity.
stars.Y: Ultra-cool brown-dwarf class near planetary temperatures.
stars.C: Carbon-rich giant star with distinctive chemistry and dust-rich envelopes.
stars.S: Intermediate giant chemistry class between oxygen- and carbon-dominant atmospheres.
stars.D: Generic white dwarf remnant with compact radius and low luminosity.

planets.earth_like_world: Temperate terrestrial world with strong biosphere potential and high colonization value.
planets.rocky: Silicate-metal terrestrial body with variable atmospheres and broad habitability outcomes.
planets.crystal_world: Speculative mineral-dominated body with crystalline crust regimes and high-value resource signatures.
planets.chthonian_world: Remnant core of a stripped giant world, dense and hostile with little atmospheric retention.
planets.rogue_world: Deep-freeze world archetype with minimal stellar heating and extreme cryogenic surface conditions.
planets.rocky_ice_world: Mixed rock-and-ice body common in colder orbital zones.
planets.icy: Ice-dominated world with volatile-rich composition and low equilibrium temperatures.
planets.water_world: Ocean-dominated terrestrial world with high volatile and atmosphere retention.
planets.ammonia_world: Cold volatile world where ammonia chemistry can dominate atmosphere and surface processes.
planets.metal_rich: Metal-enhanced terrestrial body with elevated extractive potential.
planets.metal: Dense metal-dominated body with extreme material concentration.
planets.gas_giant_class_i: Cool ammonia-cloud giant in outer-system conditions.
planets.gas_giant_class_ii: Water-cloud giant with intermediate thermal profile.
planets.gas_giant_class_iii: Cloud-sparse giant with deeper atmospheric visibility.
planets.gas_giant_class_iv: Hot giant with alkali- and silicate-rich atmospheric signatures.
planets.gas_giant_class_v: Very hot giant with energetic atmospheric circulation and strong thermal gradients.
planets.helium_rich_gas_giant: Giant with elevated helium fraction relative to standard hydrogen-helium mix.
planets.helium_gas_giant: Helium-dominant giant atmosphere with low-density envelope dynamics.
planets.gas_giant_ammonia_life: Speculative giant class with ammonia-biased biosignature potential.
planets.gas_giant_water_life: Speculative giant class with water-biased biosignature potential.
planets.water_giant: Intermediate giant with high water fraction between terrestrial and gas giant regimes.
planets.gas_giant: General giant archetype for broad hydrogen-helium dominated atmospheres.
